task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Modern Condo in Austin TX (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $750000.00 and wholesale is $600000.00. Product features: 2-bedroom luxury condo with downtown views and rooftop pool. Reference: https://www.moreland.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Modern Condo in Austin TX. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Modern Condo in Austin TX. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
